Introduction › What is quantum computing? › Qubits
# Qubits
Quantum information is richer than conventional information. Whereas digital information is measured in _bits_ , quantum information is measured in quantum bits, or _qubits_. The fundamental unit of quantum information is the qubit. A bit of information is either 0 or 1. But a qubit of information is much more crowded. It can be pictured as a sphere.
_From one bit to one qubit_
Qubits encode quantum information. To fully describe the information encoded in a qubit we need to specify two numbers, roughly describing "how much" the qubit is 1 and how much it is 0.
Whenever we represent a number in a computer we will specify it to a particular precision — 32 bits is a pretty conventional approach. So, to represent the state of a qubit we need about 64 bits.

# The problem
# The looming quantum talent gap
## Quantum advantage is here, but the skills to leverage it are not
Quantum computers are beginning to outperform classical computation at scientific and commercially relevant tasks.
Historically, the focus has centered on technology roadmaps. However, as hardware matures and real-world deployments expand, the critical bottleneck will be the scarcity of talent capable of leveraging quantum computers.
Organizations that wait risk falling behind. Black Opal helps you understand quantum applications that deliver value today. [Sign up](http://black.q-ctrl.com/) to learn the fundamentals of quantum computing and identify commercial opportunities already within reach.
###### Introducing Black Opal

### Customize Black Opal with content assignment
Content assignment provides course customization, cohort management, and progress monitoring, enabling admins to tailor quantum education to the goals of learners and curriculum structure.
![Black Opal dashboard showing assignment details, user activity stats, content topics, and assigned users with progress bars.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/6a09910ce46dfdec0dd6eea8_Assignment%20name.avif)
### Achieve simple deployment at any scale
Share a secure link and with one click a learner can begin their quantum computing journey. The invite link can be shared anywhere that makes sense for your organization—via email or on a Learning Management System—making it an effortless onboarding experience.
![Invite users interface to add members via email or invite link for Black Opal product with limits displayed.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/6a098fffc92f0cc1de43de27_Invite%20users.png)
### Meets enterprise and government accessibility standards
Black Opal is developed in conformance with WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines. Our VPAT documents accessibility support across all major assistive technologies and is available to enterprise and government customers on request.

This initiative not only demystifies complex concepts but also empowers our workforce to engage confidently with emerging quantum technologies, positioning us at the forefront of financial innovation."
Phil Intallura
Group Head of Quantum Technologies, HSBC
[Read the full case study](https://www.hsbc.com/news-and-views/views/hsbc-views/upskilling-everyone-is-vital-for-the-quantum-era)
###### Case studies
## Real-world use cases
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6864d27fc5282cb985806ed5_DC_Logo_Housed_White%201.svg) The easy-to-use, intuitive Black Opal tool allowed our QTAP participants to quickly get up to speed with quantum computing, ready to trial their real-life business use cases. There was also some great material for participants who were curious to learn more about advanced topics. Daniel Goldsmith Senior Quantum Computing Consultant , Digital Catapult ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6864ce89c5282cb9857db196_q-ctrl%20digital%20catapult%20quantum%20computing%20education.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/preparing-diverse-cohorts-with-black-opal-for-digital-catapults-hybrid-learning-quantum-technology-programme)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/67ff00d8a7cb66df5133b5d5_uoh-white.svg) Students who engaged with Black Opal as an active companion resource significantly boosted knowledge retention and ultimately understanding. Some of them even engaged further with quantum computing by choosing a final-year project in that field. Dr David Benoit Senior Lecturer in Molecular Physics and Astrochemistry , University of Hull, UK ![Large ivy-covered brick building with clock tower and people sitting on grass in front under blue sky.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/67f4bc57e953fae9dfd4bdb3_Hull%20Uni%20Hero.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/improving-quantum-education-outcomes-with-black-opal-at-the-university-of-hull-uk)

/* =========================================================
   GLOBAL STYLES
========================================================= */
body {
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
  font-smooth: never;
}

p {
  white-space: unset;
  text-wrap: pretty;
}

.text-truncate {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.w-embed:after, .w-embed:before { display: none !important; }

/* retain line height on Safari */
.button, .button-outline { font-variation-settings: "opsz" 16; }
.text-rich-text { font-variation-settings: "opsz" 18; }
.nav_link { font-variation-settings: "opsz" 16; }

.nav-link { 
  font-optical-sizing: none; 
  font-variation-settings: "opsz" 16; 
}

/* Safari Roboto Flex fix (Updated with new classes) */
.text-size-body,
.text-size-body-2,
.text-size-body-3,
.text-color-violet-700 {
  font-optical-sizing: none;
  font-variation-settings: 
    "opsz" 16,
    "wdth" 100,
    "GRAD" 0,
    "slnt" 0,
    "XTRA" 468,
    "XOPQ" 96,
    "YOPQ" 79,
    "YTLC" 514,
    "YTUC" 712,
    "YTAS" 750,
    "YTDE" -203,
    "YTFI" 738;
}

/* rich text margin fixes */
.w-richtext>:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
.w-richtext>:last-child,
.w-richtext ol li:last-child,
.w-richtext ul li:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* pointer events helpers (FIX: add leading dot on clickable-off) */
.clickable-off { pointer-events: none; }
.clickable-on { pointer-events: auto; }

/* visually hidden */
.visually-hidden {
  position: absolute !important;
  clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px);
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  height: 1px !important;
  width: 1px !important;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.div-square::after { content: ""; display: block; padding-bottom: 100%; }

main:focus-visible { outline: -webkit-focus-ring-color auto 0px; }

.container-medium, .container-small, .container-xsmall, .container-large {
  margin-right: auto !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
}

.text-style-1line { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.text-style-3lines { display: -webkit-box; overflow: hidden; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; }
.text-style-2lines { display: -webkit-box; overflow: hidden; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; }

/* gap utility */
[class*="gap-"] { gap: var(--row-gap, var(--gap-fallback)) var(--column-gap, var(--gap-fallback)); }

.gap-tiny { --row-gap: var(--size-tiny, var(--gap-fallback)); --column-gap: var(--size-tiny, var(--gap-fallback)); }

.gap-xhuge { --row-gap: var(--size-xhuge, var(--gap-fallback)); --column-gap: var(--size-xhuge, var(--gap-fallback)); }

.logo-table_row { background-color: transparent; }
.striped:nth-child(odd) { background-color: #F8F8FA; }
.striped:nth-child(even) { background-color: #FFFFFF; }

/* tables */
table {
  color: #35343C;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  line-height: 1.5rem;
  text-align: left;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 3rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}
table th { justify-content: space-between; color: #77767F; font-weight: 500; }
table th svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; color: currentcolor; background: currentcolor; }
table th, table td { padding: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px dotted #CCCBD1; }

.table-header-link { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-content: center; }

.table-compressed { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.25rem; color: #55545D; }
.table-compressed th, .table-compressed td { padding: 0.625rem; }

.table-stripped tr:nth-child(odd) td:not(th) { background: #F8F8FA; }

.table-vertical-divider th:not(:last-child),
.table-vertical-divider td:not(:last-child) { border-right: 1px dotted #CCCBD1; }

.table-hover tr:hover th,
.table-hover tr:hover td,
.table-hover.table-stripped tr:hover th,
.table-hover.table-stripped tr:hover td {
  transition: 200ms ease;
  background: #F8F5FF;
}

.text-rich-text table th { color: var(--color-headline-4); vertical-align: top; }
.text-rich-text table td { color: var(--color-body-copy); }

.text-rich-text blockquote > em {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  color: #77767F;
  font-size: 12px;
  margin-top: 8px;
}
.text-rich-text blockquote > em::before {
  display: inline-block;
  content: '—';
  margin-right: 4px;
}

/* opacity helpers */
[data-opacity="0"] { opacity: 0; }
[data-opacity="10"] { opacity: 0.1; }
[data-opacity="20"] { opacity: 0.2; }
[data-opacity="30"] { opacity: 0.3; }
[data-opacity="40"] { opacity: 0.4; }
[data-opacity="50"] { opacity: 0.5; }
[data-opacity="60"] { opacity: 0.6; }
[data-opacity="70"] { opacity: 0.7; }
[data-opacity="80"] { opacity: 0.8; }
[data-opacity="90"] { opacity: 0.9; }
[data-opacity="100"] { opacity: 1; }

[align-content="center"] .column { text-align: center; align-items: center; }
[align-content="left"] .column { text-align: left; align-items: flex-start; }
[align-content="right"] .column { text-align: right; align-items: flex-end; }

/* FIX: remove SCSS nesting; define :before separately */
.is-slot:empty {
  flex-grow: 1;
  min-height: 24px;
  height: 100%;
  background: url('https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/64fea636e214f2e762c1c369_placeholder.png') repeat top left;
  background-size: cover;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-accent);
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
}
.is-slot:empty::before {
  content: 'Slot';
  display: inline;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--color-accent);
  text-shadow: -2px 0 var(--background-color-primary), 0 2px var(--background-color-primary), 2px 0 black, 0 -2px var(--background-color-primary);
}


/* =========================================================
   COLOR STYLES (data-bg-color)
========================================================= */
[data-bg-color="info-light"] { background-color: var(--color-blue-300); }
[data-bg-color="info"] { background-color: var(--color-blue-400); }
[data-bg-color="info-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-blue-500); }

[data-bg-color="success-light"] { background-color: var(--color-green-300); }
[data-bg-color="success"] { background-color: var(--color-green-400); }
[data-bg-color="success-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-green-500); }

[data-bg-color="warning-light"] { background-color: var(--color-yellow-300); }
[data-bg-color="warning"] { background-color: var(--color-yellow-400); }
[data-bg-color="warning-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-yellow-500); }

[data-bg-color="error-light"] { background-color: var(--color-red-300); }
[data-bg-color="error"] { background-color: var(--color-red-400); }
[data-bg-color="error-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-red-500); }


/* =========================================================
   SEMANTIC STYLES (themes)
========================================================= */

:root, [data-theme="dark"], .is-dark, .is-midnight {
  --color-bright: var(--color-white);
  --color-dim: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-display-1: var(--color-white);
  --color-display-2: var(--color-display-1);
  --color-headline-1: var(--color-white);

}

[data-theme="secondary"], .is-secondary, .is-twilight {
  --color-bright: var(--color-white);

}

[data-theme="light"], .is-light, .is-daylight {
  --color-bright: var(--color-gray-900);
  --color-dim: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-display-1: var(--color-gray-900);
  --color-display-2: var(--color-display-1);
  --color-headline-1: var(--color-gray-900);

  --color-headline-6: var(--color-gray-400);
  --color-body-copy: var(--color-gray-700);
  --color-blockquote: var(--color-gray-900);
  --color-caption: var(--color-gray-400);

::selection {
  background: var(--color-accent);
  /* NOTE: you had --color-heading-1, but variables are --color-headline-1 */
  color: var(--color-headline-1);
}

body {
  background-color: var(--background-color-primary);
  color: var(--color-body-copy);
  transition: background-color 350ms ease-in-out;
}

.display-1:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-display-1); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
.display-2:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-display-2); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }

h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 1em; }

h1, .headline-1:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-1); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h2, .headline-2:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-2); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h3, .headline-3:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-3); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h4, .headline-4:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-4); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h5, .headline-5:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-5); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h6, .headline-6:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-6); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }

p, .body-copy:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-body-copy); }

.caption:not([class*="text-color-"]),
.caption-title:not([class*="text-color-"]),
.text-size-caption:not([class*="text-color-"]),
.text-size-caption-title:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-caption); }

blockquote, .blockquote:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-blockquote); border-color: var(--color-accent); }

code { padding: 0 8px; margin: 0 !important; width: 100%; border-radius: 4px; }
code, .code { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; }

li::marker { color: var(--color-accent); }
ol > li::marker { font-size: .875em; vertical-align: baseline; }

.text-style-muted:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-muted); }

a, .text-style-link { color: var(--color-link-normal); font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); text-decoration: inherit; }
a:hover, .text-style-link:hover { color: var(--color-link-hover); }

/* FIX: :press is not a real CSS pseudo-class. Use :active. */
a:active, .text-style-link:active { color: var(--color-link-press); }

/* FIX: invalid selector "a * >" */
a * { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; font-size: inherit; }

.text-color-accent:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-accent); }
.text-color-brand:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--brand-color); }

b, strong, .text-weight-bold { font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
.text-weight-medium { font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); }
.text-weight-normal { font-weight: var(--font-weight-normal); }
.text-weight-light { font-weight: var(--font-weight-light); }

.background-color-primary { background-color: var(--background-color-primary); }
.background-color-secondary { background-color: var(--background-color-secondary); }
.background-color-tertiary { background-color: var(--background-color-tertiary); }

.background-color-gradient {
  background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gradient-color-start), var(--gradient-color-end));
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.gradient-fade {
  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gradient-fade-start), var(--gradient-fade-end));
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.gradient-fade-down {
  background-image: linear-gradient(0deg, var(--gradient-fade-start), var(--gradient-fade-end));
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.banner-wrapper-background { background-color: var(--banner-wrapper-background); }

hr, .divider_component, .border-color-primary, .fs-styleguide_color-sample { border-color: var(--border-color); }

.fs-styleguide_brand { color: var(--brand-color); border-color: var(--border-color); }

@media screen and (max-width: 991px) { body.no-scroll { overflow: hidden; } }

section[data-theme="dark"] .is-invertible { filter: brightness(0) invert(1); }
section[data-theme="light"] .is-invertible { filter: invert(1); }


/* =========================================================
   COMPONENT STYLES
========================================================= */
[data-padding-top='false'] .section-padding { padding-top: 0; }
[data-centered='true'] { align-items: center; text-align: center; }

[data-background-position='center'] { object-position: center center; }
[data-background-position='tr'] { object-position: top right; }
[data-background-position='br'] { object-position: bottom right; }
[data-background-position='bl'] { object-position: bottom left; }
[data-background-position='tl'] { object-position: top left; }

@media screen and (min-width: 992px) { .nav_component_menu { transform: none !important; } }
@media screen and (max-width: 991px) {
  .w-nav-menu { overflow: auto; max-height: calc(100svh - 64px); }
}

.nav_alert-truncate {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 1;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.component_breadcrumbs { color: var(--color-breadcrumbs); }

/* Alert */
.alert {
  background-color: var(--alert-background-color, var(--color-gray-0));
  color: var(--alert-color, var(--color-gray-600));
  border-color: var(--alert-border-color, var(--color-gray-300));
}
.alert-icon {
  color: var(--alert-icon-color, var(--color-gray-400));
  border-color: var(--alert-icon-border-color, var(--color-gray-100));
}
.alert-info {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-blue-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-blue-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-blue-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-blue-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-blue-100);
}
.alert-success {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-green-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-green-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-green-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-green-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-green-100);
}
.alert-warning {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-yellow-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-yellow-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-yellow-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-yellow-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-yellow-100);
}
.alert-error {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-red-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-red-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-red-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-red-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-red-100);
}

/* Button */
:root {
  --button-border-color: var(--color-violet-500);
  --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color);
  --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-100);
}

.button, .button-square {
  background-color: var(--button-background-color);
  border-color: var(--button-border-color);
  color: var(--button-text-color);
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04), 0px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
  cursor: pointer;
}
.button:hover, .button-square:hover { --button-border-color: var(--color-white); }

/* FIX: :press -> :active */
.button:active, .button-square:active { --button-border-color: var(--color-white); }

.button-square { border-radius: 999px; }

.button-outline {
  --button-background-color: transparent;
  --button-text-color: var(--button-border-color);
  box-shadow: none;
}
.button-outline:hover,
.button-outline:active {
  --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color);
  --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-100);
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04), 0px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
}

.button-secondary {
  --button-border-color: var(--color-gray-100);
  --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color);
  --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-900);
}
.button-secondary:hover { --button-border-color: var(--color-white); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-secondary:active { --button-border-color: var(--color-gray-200); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-secondary.button-outline:hover,
.button-secondary.button-outline:active { --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-900); }

.button-error { --button-border-color: var(--color-red-400); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-error:hover { --button-border-color: var(--color-red-300); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-error:active { --button-border-color: var(--color-red-500); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }

/* Theme Toggle */
.theme-toggle .checkbox { opacity: 0; position: absolute; margin-bottom: 0; }

.theme-toggle .checkbox-label {
  background-color: var(--background-color-primary);
  width: 58px;
  height: 30px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
  border-radius: 50px;
  position: relative;
  padding: 5px;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.icon-moon { color: var(--color-violet-400); }
.icon-sun { color: var(--color-orange-400); }

.theme-toggle .checkbox-label .ball {
  background-color: var(--border-color);
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  position: absolute;
  left: 2px;
  top: 2px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  transition: transform 0.2s linear;
}

.theme-toggle .checkbox:checked + .checkbox-label .ball { transform: translateX(28px); }

/* Card */
.card-image-wrapper { transition: opacity 300ms ease; }
.card_blog-post .card-image-wrapper { opacity: 1; }
.card_blog-post:hover .card-image-wrapper { opacity: .5; }


/* =========================================================
   TEXT + IMAGE STYLES (FIX: remove SCSS nesting)
========================================================= */
@media screen and (min-width: 992px) {
  .grid_text-image {
    --section--text-image-small: 1fr;
    --section--text-image-large: 1.25fr;
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-small);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-large);

    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: var(--section-text-image-col-1) var(--section-text-image-col-2);
    gap: 6rem;
  }

  /* odd containers swap columns */
  .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-large);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-small);
  }
  .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 1;
  }

  /* Reverse order */
  [data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-large);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-small);
  }
  [data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type { order: 1; }
  [data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-small);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-large);
  }
  [data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 0;
  }

  /* Align content */
  [data-align-content="true"] .grid_text-image,
  [data-align-content="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-small);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-large);
  }
  [data-align-content="true"] .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type,
  [data-align-content="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 0;
  }

  /* Align + Reverse */
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image,
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-large);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-small);
  }
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type,
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 1;
  }
}

    .nav_component-wrapper.mobile-menu-open .container-large-nav_container {
      padding-left: 0.75rem;
      padding-right: 0.75rem;
    }

    .nav_dropdown-list:not(.w--open) {
      pointer-events: none !important;
    }

    .nav_menu.w-nav-menu {
      height: auto !important;
      max-height: 80vh !important;
      max-height: 89dvh !important;
      overflow-y: auto !important;
    }

    .nav_component-wrapper .w-nav-overlay {
      left: -1px !important;
      right: -1px !important;
      width: calc(100% + 2px) !important;
    }
  }

  .nav_container-secondary.tray-open {
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0 !important;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0 !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    border-bottom: none !important;
  }

  #nav-secondary-tray {
    /* 1. Matches your global Webflow border radius */
    border-bottom-left-radius: var(--_size-primitives---border-radius--1) !important;
    border-bottom-right-radius: var(--_size-primitives---border-radius--1) !important;
    
    /* 2. Explicitly declare all three borders to guarantee they render */
    border-left: 1px solid transparent !important;
    border-right: 1px solid transparent !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid transparent !important;
    border-top: none !important;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;

    /* 3. STOPS THE PAGE PUSH */
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 100% !important; 
    
    /* 4. FIX: Pulls the tray out 1px on the sides to connect seamlessly with the parent's outer border */
    left: -1px !important; 
    width: calc(100% + 2px) !important;
    
    box-sizing: border-box !important;
  }

  /* Forces the border color and solid background to show up when open */
  .nav_container-secondary.tray-open ~ #nav-secondary-tray,
  .nav_container-secondary.tray-open #nav-secondary-tray {
    border-left-color: rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    border-right-color: rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    border-bottom-color: rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    background-color: rgb(13, 13, 23) !important;
  }
</style>

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    // ─── Shared elements ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    const overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.classList.add('nav-overlay');
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);

    const navBar = document.querySelector('.nav_bar');
    const navWrapper = document.querySelector('.nav_component-wrapper');
    const secondaryNav = document.querySelector('.nav-secondary');
    const hamburger = navBar ? navBar.querySelector('.nav_menu-button') : null;

    // ─── Overlay helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    function showOverlay() {
      overlay.style.display = 'block';
      requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('is-visible'));
    }

    function hideOverlay() {
      overlay.classList.remove('is-visible');
      setTimeout(() => {
        overlay.style.display = 'none';
      }, 300);
    }

    // ─── Disable Webflow hover on all breakpoints ──────────────────────────────

    document.querySelectorAll('.nav_dropdown').forEach((dd) => {
      dd.setAttribute('data-hover', 'false');
      dd.setAttribute('data-delay', '0');
    });

    // ─── Mobile menu border radius + overlay width/height fix ─────────────────

    if (hamburger && navWrapper) {
      new MutationObserver(function () {
        const isOpen = hamburger.classList.contains('w--open');
        navWrapper.classList.toggle('mobile-menu-open', isOpen);

        if (isOpen) {
          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            const wNavOverlay = navWrapper.querySelector('.w-nav-overlay');
            if (wNavOverlay) {
              wNavOverlay.style.setProperty('left', '-1px', 'important');
              wNavOverlay.style.setProperty('right', '-1px', 'important');
              wNavOverlay.style.setProperty('width', 'calc(100% + 2px)', 'important');
            }

            const menu = navWrapper.querySelector('.w-nav-menu');
            if (menu) {
              menu.style.setProperty('width', 'calc(100% + 2px)', 'important');
              menu.style.setProperty('max-height', '89dvh', 'important');
            }
          });
        }
      }).observe(hamburger, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
    }

    // ─── Icon helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    const ICON_OPEN = 'translate3d(0px,0px,0px) scale3d(1,1,1) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) rotateZ(180deg) skew(0deg,0deg)';
    const ICON_CLOSED = 'translate3d(0px,0px,0px) scale3d(1,1,1) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) rotateZ(0deg) skew(0deg,0deg)';

    function setIconOpen(dd) {
      const icon = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-icon');
      if (icon) icon.style.transform = ICON_OPEN;
    }

    function setIconClosed(dd) {
      const icon = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-icon');
      if (icon) icon.style.transform = ICON_CLOSED;
    }

    // ─── Desktop dropdown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    if (window.innerWidth >= 992) {
      const dropdowns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav_dropdown'));
      const nav = document.querySelector('.nav_menu');
      let activeIndex = null;
      let closeTimer = null;
      let overflowTimers = {};

      dropdowns.forEach((dd) => {
        const toggle = dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle');
        if (toggle)
          toggle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
          });
      });

      function getAnimTarget(list) {
        return list.querySelector('.grid_12-column') || list.querySelector('.nav-container');
      }

      function measureHeight(list) {
        const prev = [list.style.height, list.style.overflow];
        list.style.height = 'auto';
        list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        const container = list.querySelector('.nav-container');
        const h = container ? container.offsetHeight + 16 : 0;
        [list.style.height, list.style.overflow] = prev;
        return h;
      }

      function openPanel(index) {
        const fromIndex = activeIndex;
        const isSwitching = fromIndex !== null && fromIndex !== index;
        const direction = fromIndex !== null && fromIndex < index ? 1 : -1;
        const list = dropdowns[index].querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
        const animTarget = getAnimTarget(list);

        clearTimeout(closeTimer);
        clearTimeout(overflowTimers[index]);

        showOverlay();

        if (secondaryNav) secondaryNav.style.setProperty('opacity', '0', 'important');

        dropdowns[index].classList.add('w--open');
        dropdowns[index].querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').classList.add('w--open');
        setIconOpen(dropdowns[index]);

        if (isSwitching) {
          const oldList = dropdowns[fromIndex].querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
          const oldTarget = getAnimTarget(oldList);
          const currentHeight = oldList.getBoundingClientRect().height;

          clearTimeout(overflowTimers[fromIndex]);

          dropdowns[fromIndex].classList.remove('w--open');
          dropdowns[fromIndex].querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').classList.remove('w--open');
          setIconClosed(dropdowns[fromIndex]);

          if (oldTarget) {
            oldTarget.style.transition = 'none';
            oldTarget.style.opacity = '0';
          }

          oldList.classList.remove('is-open');
          oldList.style.cssText += 'overflow:hidden;transition:none;height:0px;';
          list.style.cssText += `overflow:hidden;transition:none;height:${currentHeight}px;`;
        }

        animTarget.style.transition = 'none';
        animTarget.style.transform = `translateX(${direction * 40}px)`;
        animTarget.style.opacity = '0';

        const targetHeight = measureHeight(list);

        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
          list.style.transition = 'height 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';
          list.style.height = targetHeight + 'px';

          overflowTimers[index] = setTimeout(() => {
            if (activeIndex === index) {
              list.style.overflow = 'visible';
              list.classList.add('is-open');
            }
          }, 310);

          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            animTarget.style.transition = 'transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.25s ease';
            animTarget.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)';
            animTarget.style.opacity = '1';
          });
        });

        activeIndex = index;
      }

      function closeAll() {
        dropdowns.forEach((dd, i) => {
          const list = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
          const animTarget = getAnimTarget(list);

          clearTimeout(overflowTimers[i]);

          list.classList.remove('is-open');
          list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
          list.style.transition = 'height 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';
          list.style.height = '0px';

          dd.classList.remove('w--open');
          dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').classList.remove('w--open');
          setIconClosed(dd);

          if (animTarget) {
            animTarget.style.transition = 'opacity 0.15s ease';
            animTarget.style.opacity = '0';
          }
        });

        hideOverlay();

        if (secondaryNav) secondaryNav.style.removeProperty('opacity');

        activeIndex = null;
      }

      function isMovingTowardList(e) {
        if (activeIndex === null) return false;
        const rect = dropdowns[activeIndex].querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list').getBoundingClientRect();
        return e.clientY >= rect.top - 20 && e.clientX >= rect.left && e.clientX <= rect.right;
      }

      overlay.addEventListener('click', closeAll);

      dropdowns.forEach((dd, i) => {
        const list = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
        const animTarget = getAnimTarget(list);
        const navContainer = list.querySelector('.nav-container');
        const icon = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-icon');

        list.style.height = '0px';
        list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        list.style.display = 'block';

        if (navContainer) navContainer.style.marginTop = '8px';
        if (animTarget) animTarget.style.opacity = '0';
        if (icon) icon.style.transition = 'transform 0.3s ease';

        dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').addEventListener('mouseenter', () => openPanel(i));
        dd.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearTimeout(closeTimer));

        dd.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
          if (isMovingTowardList(e)) return;
          if (!e.relatedTarget || !dd.contains(e.relatedTarget)) closeTimer = setTimeout(closeAll, 150);
        });

        list.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearTimeout(closeTimer));
        list.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
          if (!e.relatedTarget || (!list.contains(e.relatedTarget) && !nav.contains(e.relatedTarget))) closeTimer = setTimeout(closeAll, 150);
        });
      });

      if (nav) {
        nav.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearTimeout(closeTimer));
        nav.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
          if (isMovingTowardList(e)) return;
          if (!e.relatedTarget || !nav.contains(e.relatedTarget)) closeTimer = setTimeout(closeAll, 150);
        });
      }
    }

    // ─── Mobile overlay ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    if (window.innerWidth < 992) {
      let overlaySource = null; // 'hamburger' | 'dropdown'

      if (hamburger) {
        new MutationObserver(function () {
          if (hamburger.classList.contains('w--open')) {
            overlaySource = 'hamburger';
            showOverlay();
          } else if (overlaySource === 'hamburger') {
            overlaySource = null;
            hideOverlay();
          }
        }).observe(hamburger, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
      }

      document.querySelectorAll('.nav_dropdown').forEach((dd) => {
        const toggle = dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle');
        if (!toggle) return;

        new MutationObserver(function () {
          if (overlaySource === 'hamburger') return;

          const anyOpen = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav_button-toggle'))
            .some((t) => t.classList.contains('w--open'));

          if (anyOpen) {
            overlaySource = 'dropdown';
            showOverlay();
          } else {
            overlaySource = null;
            hideOverlay();
          }
        }).observe(toggle, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
      });

      overlay.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        e.stopPropagation();

        if (overlaySource === 'hamburger' && hamburger) {
          hamburger.click();
        } else {
          document.querySelectorAll('.nav_button-toggle.w--open').forEach((t) => t.click());
        }

        overlaySource = null;
        hideOverlay();
      });
    }

// ─── Secondary nav ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    const primaryNav = navBar;

    // 1. Target both headers so the mobile tray builds properly
    const hero = document.querySelector('.section_header, .section_product-hero');

    if (!secondaryNav || !hero) return;

    const navItems = secondaryNav.querySelector('.nav-secondary-items');
    const navLogo = secondaryNav.querySelector('.nav-secondary-logo');
    const container = secondaryNav.querySelector('.nav_container-secondary');

    const mobileToggle = document.createElement('button');
    mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-controls', 'nav-secondary-tray');
    mobileToggle.style.cssText = 'display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;width:100%;background:none;border:none;padding:0;cursor:pointer;height:44px;flex-shrink:0;';

    const logoClone = navLogo.cloneNode(true);
    logoClone.removeAttribute('style');

    const chevron = document.createElement('span');
    chevron.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:transform 0.3s ease;';
    chevron.innerHTML = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M19.5 8.25L12 15.75L4.5 8.25" stroke="#F8F8FA" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';

    mobileToggle.appendChild(logoClone);
    mobileToggle.appendChild(chevron);

    const tray = document.createElement('div');
    tray.id = 'nav-secondary-tray';
    tray.style.cssText = 'display:none;overflow:hidden;max-height:0;width:100%;background-color:#0d0d17d1;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(26px);backdrop-filter:blur(26px);box-sizing:border-box;padding:0 .65rem;';

    const trayInner = document.createElement('div');
    trayInner.style.cssText = 'display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;padding:0 0 0.75rem 0;';

    const links = navItems.querySelectorAll('a');

    links.forEach(function (link, index) {
      const trayLink = link.cloneNode(true);
      const isLast = index === links.length - 1;
      trayLink.style.cssText = 'padding:0.75rem;color:var(--color-gray-0);font-size:0.9375rem;text-decoration:none;display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;box-sizing:border-box;' + (isLast ? '' : 'border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);');

      if (trayLink.getAttribute('href').startsWith('#')) trayLink.addEventListener('click', closeTray);

      trayInner.appendChild(trayLink);
    });

    tray.appendChild(trayInner);

    container.appendChild(mobileToggle);
    container.appendChild(tray); // FIX: Appended to container so the absolute width perfectly aligns

    overlay.addEventListener('click', function () {
      if (isOpen) closeTray();
    });

    let isOpen = false;

    function openTray() {
      isOpen = true;
      tray.style.maxHeight = trayInner.scrollHeight + 'px';
      chevron.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
      mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
      container.classList.add('tray-open');
      showOverlay();
    }

    function closeTray() {
      isOpen = false;
      tray.style.maxHeight = '0';
      chevron.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
      mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
      container.classList.remove('tray-open');
      hideOverlay();
    }

    mobileToggle.addEventListener('click', () => (isOpen ? closeTray() : openTray()));

    function applyLayout() {
      if (window.innerWidth <= 767) {
        mobileToggle.style.display = 'flex';
        navLogo.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important');
        navItems.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('height', 'auto', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('min-height', 'unset', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('display', 'flex', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('flex-direction', 'column', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('align-items', 'stretch', 'important');
        container.style.setProperty('max-width', '100%', 'important');
        container.style.setProperty('padding-top', '0', 'important');
        container.style.setProperty('padding-bottom', '0', 'important');
        tray.style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        mobileToggle.style.display = 'none';
        navLogo.style.removeProperty('display');
        navItems.style.removeProperty('display');
        closeTray();
        tray.style.display = 'none';
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('height', '45px', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('min-height', '45px', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.removeProperty('flex-direction');
        secondaryNav.style.removeProperty('align-items');
        container.style.removeProperty('max-width');
        container.style.removeProperty('padding-top');
        container.style.removeProperty('padding-bottom');
      }
    }

    applyLayout();
    window.addEventListener('resize', applyLayout);

    // 2. Keep your 4px spacer and exact top calculations so spacing doesn't break
    const spacer = document.createElement('div');
    spacer.style.cssText = 'height:4px;width:100%;pointer-events:none;';
    secondaryNav.parentNode.insertBefore(spacer, secondaryNav);

    function updateSecondaryTop() {
      const navHeight = primaryNav ? primaryNav.offsetHeight : 0;
      const navStickyTop = primaryNav ? (parseInt(getComputedStyle(primaryNav).top) || 0) : 0;
      secondaryNav.style.setProperty('top', navStickyTop + navHeight + 4 + 'px', 'important');
    }

    updateSecondaryTop();
    window.addEventListener('resize', updateSecondaryTop);

    // 3. Keep it sticky, but REMOVE the observer/opacity logic so Script 2 can control it!
    secondaryNav.style.setProperty('position', 'sticky', 'important');
    
    secondaryNav.style.marginTop = '0px';

  });
</script></div></nav><div style="height: 4px; width: 100%; pointer-events: none;"></div><div data-animation="default" data-collapse="none" data-duration="400" data-easing="ease" data-easing2="ease" role="banner" class="nav-secondary w-nav" style="height: 45px !important; min-height: 45px !important; top: 71px !important; position: sticky !important; margin-top: 0px;"><div class="nav_container-secondary"><img width="204" src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/69bc746496241fdc7d737ef4_Black.svg" alt="Black Opal logo" loading="eager" class="nav-secondary-logo" height="37"><nav role="navigation" class="nav-secondary-items w-nav-menu"><a data-wf-native-id-path="c9d5c8df-07a2-d767-40b8-77f26883971f:4f18556b-3540-846d-14f4-8785eaf9be8d" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="4f18556b-3540-846d-14f4-8785eaf9be8d" data-wf-component-context="%5B%7B%22componentId%22%3A%224f18556b-3540-846d-14f4-8785eaf9be86%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22c9d5c8df-07a2-d767-40b8-77f26883971f%22%7D%5D" href="/black-opal/educators" class="nav-link w-nav-link">Educators</a><a data-wf-native-id-path="c9d5c8df-07a2-d767-40b8-77f26883971f:4f18556b-3540-846d-14f4-8785eaf9be8f" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="4f18556b-3540-846d-14f4-8785eaf9be8f" data-wf-component-context="%5B%7B%22componentId%22%3A%224f18556b-3540-846d-14f4-8785eaf9be86%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22c9d5c8df-07a2-d767-40b8-77f26883971f%22%7D%5D" href="/black-opal/black-opal-for-individuals" class="nav-link w-nav-link">Individuals</a></nav><div class="nav_menu-button w-nav-button" style="-webkit-user-select: text;" aria-label="menu" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="w-nav-overlay-1" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false"><div class="hamburger_wrap"><div class="hamburger_line"></div><div class="hamburger_embed w-embed"><style>

/* ==========================================
   SECONDARY NAV STYLES
   ========================================== */

/* ─── 1. Base & Slide Animations ─── */
.nav-secondary {
  z-index: 1000 !important; 
  /* SLIDE IN: Starts fast, gently glides to a stop */
  transition: transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) !important;
}

.nav-secondary.is-hidden {
  /* Hide distance: -300px ensures it fully clears the screen below primary nav */
  transform: translateY(-300px) !important; 
  /* SLIDE OUT: Starts slow, smoothly accelerates out of view */
  transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) !important;
}

/* ─── 2. Chameleon Container Setup ─── */
.nav_container-secondary {
  position: relative !important; /* FIX: Locks the tray's width perfectly to this container */
  transition: background-color 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, backdrop-filter 0.3s ease, -webkit-backdrop-filter 0.3s ease !important;
  border-style: solid !important;
  border-width: 1px !important;
  border-color: transparent !important; /* Invisible on load so it blends into Hero */
  border-radius: var(--_size-primitives---border-radius--1) !important;
}

/* Makes the nav solid when the tray is open so the dark overlay doesn't bleed through */
.nav_container-secondary.tray-open {
  background-color: rgb(13, 13, 23) !important; 
  backdrop-filter: none !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
}
  
/* ─── 3. Scrolled State (Matches Primary Nav) ─── */
.nav-secondary.is-scrolled .nav_container-secondary {
  background-color: rgba(13, 13, 23, 0.82) !important; 
  backdrop-filter: blur(26px) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(26px) !important; /* Fixes Safari rendering */
  border-color: #373753 !important; /* <-- Updated color here */
}
  
@media screen and (min-width: 1440px) {
  .nav-secondary.is-scrolled .nav_container-secondary {
    background-color: rgba(13, 13, 23, 0.82) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(26px) !important;
    border-color: #373753 !important; /* <-- Updated color here */
  }
}

/* Collapse the tray's borders to 0 when closed so it doesn't cover the parent's border */
#nav-secondary-tray {
  border-width: 0 !important;
}

/* Restore the 1px borders when the tray opens and apply the correct border colors */
.nav_container-secondary.tray-open ~ #nav-secondary-tray,
.nav_container-secondary.tray-open #nav-secondary-tray {
  border-width: 1px !important;
  border-left-color: #373753 !important;   /* <-- Updated color here */
  border-right-color: #373753 !important;  /* <-- Updated color here */
  border-bottom-color: #373753 !important; /* <-- Updated color here */
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

  // ==========================================
  // 1. SETUP
  // ==========================================
  const secondaryNav = document.querySelector('.nav-secondary');
  
  // Updated to look for either hero section class
  const heroSection = document.querySelector('.section_product-hero, .section_header');
  
  if (!secondaryNav) return; // Exit gracefully if secondary nav isn't on the page

  // ==========================================
  // 2. SMART STICKY & MORPHING LOGIC
  // ==========================================
  let lastScrollTop = 0;
  let isNavHidden = false;
  
  const morphThreshold = 10;  // Point where transparent nav turns into frosted glass
  let scrollThreshold = 250;  // Fallback threshold

  // Update the safe zone threshold based on the hero section's height
  function updateThreshold() {
    if (heroSection) {
      // Calculates the bottom position of the hero section relative to the document
      scrollThreshold = heroSection.offsetTop + heroSection.offsetHeight;
    }
  }

  // Calculate on load and recalculate if the user resizes their window
  updateThreshold();
  window.addEventListener('resize', updateThreshold);

  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    let currentScroll = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

    // ─── A. Morphing Background ───
    if (currentScroll > morphThreshold) {
      secondaryNav.classList.add('is-scrolled');
    } else {
      secondaryNav.classList.remove('is-scrolled');
    }

    // ─── B. Slide In/Out Logic ───
    // 1. Safe Zone (Inside Hero Section) - Always show nav
    if (currentScroll <= scrollThreshold) {
      if (isNavHidden) {
        secondaryNav.classList.remove('is-hidden');
        isNavHidden = false;
      }
      lastScrollTop = currentScroll <= 0 ? 0 : currentScroll;
      return;
    }

    // 2. Scrolling DOWN (Past Hero) - Hide Nav
    if (currentScroll > lastScrollTop && !isNavHidden) {
      secondaryNav.classList.add('is-hidden');
      isNavHidden = true;
    } 
    // 3. Scrolling UP - Show Nav
    else if (currentScroll < lastScrollTop && isNavHidden) {
      secondaryNav.classList.remove('is-hidden');
      isNavHidden = false;
    }

    lastScrollTop = currentScroll <= 0 ? 0 : currentScroll; 
  }, { passive: true });

});
</script></div><div class="w-nav-overlay" data-wf-ignore="" id="w-nav-overlay-1"></div></div><main class="main-wrapper"><section class="section_product-hero"><div class="section-padding is-hero"><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><div class="product-hero_content"><div id="w-node-_521eb25b-ce82-8891-f411-2b4050cd1891-50cd188d" class="product-hero_text-wrapper"><h1 class="display-1">Build a quantum-ready workforce</h1><div class="product-hero-body"><div class="text-size-body-1 text-size-medium text-color-light text-balance">Understand use cases and map quantum solutions to real business problems.</div></div><div class="product-hero_button-wrapper"><div class="div-block-3"><a data-wf-native-id-path="521eb25b-ce82-8891-f411-2b4050cd188c:ee86b057-446f-a1fd-1b3a-d1a8871a3d46" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="ee86b057-446f-a1fd-1b3a-d1a8871a3d46" data-wf-component-context="%5B%7B%22componentId%22%3A%22521eb25b-ce82-8891-f411-2b4050cd188d%22%2C%22instanceId%22%3A%22521eb25b-ce82-8891-f411-2b4050cd188c%22%7D%5D" href="http://black.q-ctrl.com/" class="button button-xl w-inline-block" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><div>Get started</div><div class="w-embed"><svg class="btn-hover-arrow" width="10" height="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 10 10" style="display:block; margin-left:4px; overflow:visible;">

#bo-panel * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
#bo-panel { width: 100%; min-height: 860px; max-width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #0D0D17; border-radius: 16px; padding: 4px 12px 12px 12px; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
#bo-panel .sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; padding-top: 4px; width: 32px; flex-shrink: 0; }
#bo-panel .chrome { min-height: 836px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: rgba(23,23,38,0.85); border-radius: 10px; border: 0.5px solid #373753; overflow: hidden; }
#bo-panel .titlebar { flex-shrink: 0; background: rgba(17,17,29,0.9); border-bottom: 0.5px solid #373753; padding: 0 16px; height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
#bo-panel .titlebar-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }
#bo-panel .titlebar-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; }
#bo-panel .nav-logo { width: 24px; height: 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 8px; }

#bo-panel .nav-link { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: #9D9DBE; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 2px; cursor: default; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; transition: none; }
#bo-panel .nav-link:hover { background: transparent; color: #9D9DBE; }
#bo-panel .nav-link.active { background: #1D073C; color: #AB8DFB; }
#bo-panel .nav-link.active:hover { background: #1D073C; color: #AB8DFB; }

#bo-panel .nav-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0.5; cursor: default; }
#bo-panel .nav-icon svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
#bo-panel .nav-avatar { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0B65B9, #052D53); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; cursor: default; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; }
#bo-panel .body { flex: 1; min-height: 0; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
#bo-panel .left { border-right: 0.5px solid #373753; padding: 0 32px 32px 24px; overflow: auto; }
#bo-panel .right { padding: 0 32px 32px 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: visible; }
#bo-panel .sec-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 30px; margin-left: -24px; margin-top: 0; }

#bo-panel .sec-pill { border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; padding: 7px 20px 7px 16px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; font-family: 'Satoshi Variable', sans-serif; display: inline-block; }

#bo-panel .sec-pill.read { background: #062541; color: #D4D4E3; }
#bo-panel .sec-pill.apply { background: #1D073C; color: #D4D4E3; }
#bo-panel .sec-pill.ask { background: #2B1B41; color: #D4D4E3; } 
#bo-panel .mobile-pill { display: none; } 
#bo-panel .mobile-chevron { display: none; } 
#bo-panel .mobile-hamburger { display: none; } 

#bo-panel .l-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 400; color: #F8F8FA; margin-bottom: 24px; line-height: 1.3; font-family: 'Satoshi Variable', sans-serif; }

#bo-panel .steps { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-top: 4px; position: relative; }
#bo-panel .steps::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 11px; top: 33px; bottom: 11px; width: 1px; background: #4B2D8F; z-index: 0; }
#bo-panel .step { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 12px; color: #55545D; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; }
#bo-panel .step-dot { width: 23px; height: 23px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid #373753; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; color: #55545D; position: relative; z-index: 1; background: #171726; }
#bo-panel .step-dot.done { background: #896BF5; border-color: #896BF5; color: #fff; }
#bo-panel .step-dot.cur { border-color: #896BF5; color: #896BF5; }
#bo-panel .step.active { color: #F8F8FA; font-weight: 500; }

#bo-panel .s-row { 
  display: flex; 
  flex-direction: column; 
  align-items: flex-start; 
  gap: 12px; 
  padding-bottom: 0px; 
  margin-bottom: 10px; 
  width: 100%; 
  -webkit-user-select: none; 
  user-select: none; 
}
#bo-panel .s-label-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; width: 100%; }
#bo-panel .s-label { font-size: 13px; color: #F8F8FA; width: 100%; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; }
#bo-panel .s-track-row { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; }

#bo-panel .s-track { flex: 1; height: 2px; background: #373753; border-radius: 1px; position: relative; cursor: pointer; }

/* NEW: Invisible hit area for massively improved clickability */
#bo-panel .s-track::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -20px;
  bottom: -20px;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 3;
}

#bo-panel .s-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 1px; background: #AB8DFB; position: relative; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none; }

#bo-panel .s-ticks {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
}
#bo-panel .s-tick {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  width: 2px;
  height: 8px;
  background: #373753;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  border-radius: 1px;
}

@keyframes bo-pulse {

  70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(171,141,251,0); }
  100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(171,141,251,0); }
}

#bo-panel .s-thumb { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: #1D073C; border: 2px solid #AB8DFB; position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); animation: bo-pulse 2s infinite; z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; }
#bo-panel .s-thumb.interacting { animation: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(171,141,251,0.35); }

              <h1 class="l-title">Qubits</h1>
              <div class="read-body">
                <p style="margin-bottom:20px;">Quantum information is richer than conventional information. Whereas digital information is measured in <em>bits</em>, quantum information is measured in quantum bits, or <em>qubits</em>. The fundamental unit of quantum information is the qubit. A bit of information is either 0 or 1. But a qubit of information is much more crowded. It can be pictured as a sphere.</p>

                  <p style="font-size:12px; margin-top:10px;"><em>From one bit to one qubit</em></p>
                </div>

                <p style="margin-bottom:20px;">Qubits encode quantum information. To fully describe the information encoded in a qubit we need to specify two numbers, roughly describing "how much" the qubit is 1 and how much it is 0.</p>
                <p>Whenever we represent a number in a computer we will specify it to a particular precision — 32 bits is a pretty conventional approach. So, to represent the state of a qubit we need about 64 bits.</p>
              </div>
            </div>

<script>
(function(){
  // Load Lottie Animation
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    lottie.loadAnimation({
      container: document.getElementById('lottie-container'), 
      renderer: 'svg',
      loop: true,
      autoplay: true,
      path: 'https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/6a0cf697672d8fa696d6e9f3_0.1.json' 
    });
  });

  // Check if it's mobile right on load, default to 0.5 (middle) instead of 0
  var isMobile = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 767px)").matches;
  var initialVal = isMobile ? 0.5 : 0;
  var theta = initialVal, phi = initialVal, PI = Math.PI;

  function updateSphere() {
    var r = 80, cx = 110, cy = 110;
    var thR = theta * PI, phR = phi * 2 * PI;
    var x = Math.sin(thR) * Math.cos(phR), y = Math.sin(thR) * Math.sin(phR), z = Math.cos(thR);
    var px = cx + (x * r * 0.75) + (y * 15), py = cy - (z * r);
    document.getElementById('bo-vec').setAttribute('x2', px);
    document.getElementById('bo-vec').setAttribute('y2', py);
  }

  function setSlider(id, v) {
    var pct = (v * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
    document.getElementById('bo-fi-' + id).style.width = pct;
    document.getElementById('bo-th-' + id).style.left = pct;
  }

  function makeDrag(id, isTheta) {
    var track = document.getElementById('bo-tr-' + id);
    var thumb = document.getElementById('bo-th-' + id);
    
    function onMove(cx) {
      var rect = track.getBoundingClientRect();
      var rawV = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (cx - rect.left) / rect.width));
      var v = Math.round(rawV * 4) / 4;
      
      thumb.classList.add('interacting');
      if (isTheta) theta = v; else phi = v;
      setSlider(id, v); 
      updateSphere();
    }
    
    track.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
      onMove(e.clientX);
      var mm = e2 => onMove(e2.clientX);
      var mu = () => { 
        document.removeEventListener('mousemove', mm); 
        document.removeEventListener('mouseup', mu); 
        thumb.classList.remove('interacting');
      };
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', mm); 
      document.addEventListener('mouseup', mu);
    });
    
    track.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
      onMove(e.touches[0].clientX);
    }, {passive:true});
    
    track.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
      onMove(e.touches[0].clientX);
    }, {passive:true});
    
    track.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
      thumb.classList.remove('interacting');
    }, {passive:true});
  }

  makeDrag('t', true); 
  makeDrag('p', false);
  
  // Set the default sliders based on our initial mobile check
  setSlider('t', initialVal); 
  setSlider('p', initialVal); 
  updateSphere();
})();
</script></div></div></div></div><div class="w-embed"></div><div class="w-embed"><div class="halftone-bg_wrap">

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const tracks = document.querySelectorAll('[carousel-content]');
  if (!tracks.length) return;

  // Clone logos
  tracks.forEach(track => {
    const originals = Array.from(track.children);
    originals.forEach(el => {
      const clone = el.cloneNode(true);
      clone.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      track.appendChild(clone);
    });
  });

  // Keep track of the initial window width
  let windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
  let resizeTimer;

  // Restart animation ONLY if the window width changes
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    // Check if the current width is different from the stored width
    if (window.innerWidth !== windowWidth) {
      windowWidth = window.innerWidth; // Update the stored width
      
      clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      resizeTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        tracks.forEach(track => {
          track.style.animation = 'none';
          track.offsetHeight; // force reflow
          track.style.animation = '';
        });
      }, 150);
    }
  });
});

.curriculum_accordion {

}

  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  width: 100%;
}

/* 3. Dropdown list base state (Closed) */
.curriculum_accordion .w-dropdown-list {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: 0fr;
  transition: grid-template-rows 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), padding-bottom 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  position: static !important;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 0 !important; 
  background: transparent !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border: none !important;
}

/* 4. The inner content wrapper - Force ZERO padding/margin so it hits the edges */
.curriculum_accordion .w-dropdown-list > * {
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 0px !important;
  margin: 0px !important;
  width: 100% !important;
}

/* 4.1 Force the divider line to span the absolute full width */
.curriculum_accordion .w-dropdown-list .curriculum_badge-divider {
  margin: 0px !important;
  padding: 0px !important;
  width: 100% !important;

.curriculum_accordion .w-dropdown-list.w--open {
  grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  padding-bottom: 20px !important; 
  position: static !important;

/* 6. Clean up borders when open */

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  // Target the components directly using the correct class name
  const accordions = document.querySelectorAll('.curriculum_accordion');

  accordions.forEach(function (accordion) {
    const trigger = accordion.querySelector('.w-dropdown-toggle');
    const panel   = accordion.querySelector('.w-dropdown-list');

    if (!trigger || !panel) return;

    trigger.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      // Prevent Webflow's native dropdown scripts from interfering
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      e.stopImmediatePropagation();

      const isOpen = accordion.classList.contains('is-open');

      // Dynamically find the grouping wrapper to close siblings.
      const wrapper = accordion.closest('.curriculum_accordion-wrapper') || document;
      const siblings = wrapper.querySelectorAll('.curriculum_accordion');

      // Close all siblings in the group
      siblings.forEach(function (sibling) {
        sibling.classList.remove('is-open');
      });

      // Open the clicked one if it was closed
      if (!isOpen) {
        accordion.classList.add('is-open');
      }
    });
  });
});
</script></div></section><section class="section_image-full"><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><img width="70" loading="lazy" alt="Hands typing on a laptop with screen showing a quantum computing learning interface and graph." src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/6a066918fe33b677fb1b5a69_q-ctrl_products_black-opal_desktop-qubits.webp" class="width-full border-radius1"></div></section><section class="section_product-offering"><div class="section-padding"><div class="flex-col gap-f"><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><div class="grid_12-column"><div id="w-node-_1a82b85c-3f37-bcb8-506b-898c0574a203-0a72c230" class="eyebrow"><h1 class="headline-6 margin-0">Who its for</h1></div><div id="w-node-_92ad322a-bdc9-4143-a181-a4e1f2d077b9-0a72c230" class="column"><h2 class="headline-1">Future-proof with a quantum edge</h2></div><div id="w-node-dfc5cbaf-505f-2fc9-4b42-458b8801d3fc-0a72c230" class="column"><h3 class="headline-3 text-color-gray-300"><span style="white-space: nowrap;">Black Opal</span> is built for business professionals and educators from any background</h3></div></div></div><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><div class="grid_12-column"><div id="w-node-efdabe2c-db9f-bd6d-9a59-e13da54663a5-0a72c230" class="column"><div class="card_package"><div><div><h6 class="headline-6">Enterprise</h6></div><h2 class="headline-2"><span style="white-space: nowrap;">Black Opal</span> for Enterprise</h2></div><div class="bullet-list_wrapper"><div class="container_bullet-list"><div class="icon-1x1-2xlarge w-embed"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 22 22" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

  .section_features-list .feature_row,
  .section_features-list .feature_row-header {
    opacity: 0 !important;
    transform: translateY(24px) !important;
    
    /* FIX 1: Faster transition using a smooth deceleration curve */
    transition: opacity 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) !important;
    
    /* FIX 2: Hardware Acceleration. Tells the browser to prep the GPU for these specific animations */
    will-change: opacity, transform; 
  }

  .section_features-list .feature_row.is-visible,
  .section_features-list .feature_row-header.is-visible {
    opacity: 1 !important;
    transform: translateY(0) !important;
  }
</style>

<script>
  (function () {
    function init() {
      var section = document.querySelector('.section_features-list'); 
      
      if (!section) return;

      var items = section.querySelectorAll('.feature_row, .feature_row-header');
      if (!items.length) return;

      let staggerIndex = 0;
      let resetTimer;

      var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
        entries.forEach(function (entry) {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            
            // FIX 3: Tighter Stagger. 50ms (down from 150ms) creates a rapid, cohesive ripple effect.
            let currentDelay = staggerIndex * 50; 
            
            setTimeout(function () {
              entry.target.classList.add('is-visible');
            }, currentDelay);
            
            staggerIndex++;
            observer.unobserve(entry.target);

            clearTimeout(resetTimer);
            // Increased the reset window slightly to group items better if the user scrolls slowly
            resetTimer = setTimeout(function() {
              staggerIndex = 0;
            }, 150); 

          }
        });
      }, { 
        // FIX 4: Lower threshold (10% instead of 15%) so they trigger just a fraction of a second earlier
        threshold: 0.1 
      });

      items.forEach(function (item) { observer.observe(item); });
    }

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
    } else {
      init();
    }
  })();
</script></div><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><div class="eyebrow"><h6 class="headline-6">Specifications</h6></div><div class="grid_12-column"><div id="w-node-_5419661b-cf0f-dd04-21c2-20e964bfcf8e-64bfcf85" class="grid_column justify-center"><h2 class="headline-1 margin-0">Enterprise features</h2></div><div id="w-node-_5419661b-cf0f-dd04-21c2-20e964bfcf91-64bfcf85"><h3 class="headline-3 text-color-gray-300">Empower your workforce to learn quantum computing with the industry-leading quantum education platform</h3></div></div></div><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><div><div class="feature_row-header"><div id="w-node-_91c94403-63f0-a2d4-24cc-86082245d72c-2245d72b" class="column"><h5 class="headline-5">Learn</h5></div><div id="w-node-_91c94403-63f0-a2d4-24cc-86082245d72f-2245d72b" class="column"><h5 class="headline-5">Organizations</h5></div><div id="w-node-_91c94403-63f0-a2d4-24cc-86082245d732-2245d72b" class="column"><h5 class="headline-5">Individual</h5></div></div><div class="feature_row"><div id="w-node-_4b670e7b-2324-ec3b-8f3a-7a267c560f07-7c560f06" class="column"><div class="text-size-body-3 font-mono">BEGINNER</div><div class="feature_row-divider-mob"></div></div><div id="w-node-_4b670e7b-2324-ec3b-8f3a-7a267c560f0a-7c560f06" class="column"><div class="icon-1x1-xlarge w-embed"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 22 22" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></section><section data-section-id="" data-theme="dark" data-padding-top="true" data-reversed="false" data-align-content="false" class="section_text-image"><div class="section-padding"><div class="flex-col gap-huge"><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large container_text-image w-container"><div class="grid_text-image"><div class="grid_column justify-center"><h3 class="headline-3">Customize <span style="white-space: nowrap;">Black Opal</span> with content assignment</h3><div class="text-rich-text w-richtext"><p>Content assignment provides course customization, cohort management, and progress monitoring, enabling admins to tailor quantum education to the goals of learners and curriculum structure.</p></div></div><div class="grid_column"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/6a09910ce46dfdec0dd6eea8_Assignment%20name.avif" loading="lazy" width="Auto" alt="Black Opal dashboard showing assignment details, user activity stats, content topics, and assigned users with progress bars." class="width-full border-radius1"></div></div></div><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large container_text-image w-container"><div class="grid_text-image"><div class="grid_column justify-center"><h3 class="headline-3">Achieve simple deployment at any scale</h3><div class="text-rich-text w-richtext"><p>Share a secure link and with one click a learner can begin their quantum computing journey. The invite link can be shared anywhere that makes sense for your organization—via email or on a Learning Management System—making it an effortless onboarding experience.</p></div></div><div id="w-node-f87816ac-8e95-b669-1d0a-ee05b481be78-baf10148" class="grid_column"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/6a098fffc92f0cc1de43de27_Invite%20users.png" loading="lazy" width="70" alt="Invite users interface to add members via email or invite link for Black Opal product with limits displayed." class="width-full border-radius1"></div></div></div></div></div></section><section id="VPAT" class="section_split-text-image"><div class="section-padding padding-top padding-0"><div class="flex-col gap-4xl"><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><div class="grid_12-column gap-2xl"><div id="w-node-_37ec5ec9-2ae8-1f90-088d-837f949d9d85-0a72c230" class="grid_column"><h3 class="headline-3">Meets enterprise and government accessibility standards</h3><div class="text-rich-text w-richtext"><p><span style="white-space: nowrap;">Black Opal</span> is developed in conformance with WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines. Our VPAT documents accessibility support across all major assistive technologies and is available to enterprise and government customers on request.</p></div><div class="button-spacer"><a data-wf-native-id-path="dbedbd93-8107-9850-33f8-7affbc65820a" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="dbedbd93-8107-9850-33f8-7affbc65820a" href="https://form.typeform.com/to/CYa1eRL2#contact_type=xxxxx" class="button button-outline button-light button-lg w-button" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Request a VPAT</a></div></div><div id="w-node-_37ec5ec9-2ae8-1f90-088d-837f949d9d84-0a72c230" class="grid_column"><div class="card_technical"><div class="technical_card-header"><div class="icon_box"><div class="icon-1x1-xlarge w-embed"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const carousels = document.querySelectorAll('.section_case-studies');

    carousels.forEach((carousel) => {
      const swiperElement = carousel.querySelector('.swiper');
      const nextButton = carousel.querySelector('.slider-next');
      const prevButton = carousel.querySelector('.slider-prev');

      if (swiperElement) {
        new Swiper(swiperElement, {
          slidesPerView: 'auto', 
          spaceBetween: 24, // THIS IS WHAT CREATES YOUR GAP
          slidesOffsetBefore: 0, 
          
          observer: true,
          observeParents: true,
          resizeObserver: true,
          
          grabCursor: true, 
          keyboard: {
            enabled: true,
            onlyInViewport: true,
          },
          a11y: {
            slideRole: "listitem"
          },
          
          navigation: {
            nextEl: nextButton,
            prevEl: prevButton,
          },
          
          on: {
            init: function () {
              const swiper = this;
              setTimeout(() => swiper.emit('resize'), 100); 
            },
            resize: function () {
              const swiper = this;
              if (window.innerWidth < 992 && swiper.slides.length > 0) {
                const containerWidth = swiper.el.clientWidth;
                const lastSlideWidth = swiper.slides[swiper.slides.length - 1].offsetWidth;
                swiper.params.slidesOffsetAfter = Math.max(0, containerWidth - lastSlideWidth);
              } else {
                swiper.params.slidesOffsetAfter = 0; 
              }
              swiper.update();
            }
          }
        });
      }
    });
  });
</script>

<style>

.text-style-quote1 {

  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  margin-left: -12px !important; 
  padding-left: 12px !important;
  width: calc(100% + 12px) !important;

  /* FASTER SPEED FOR WHEN THEY UNHOVER (The "Out" animation) */
  transition: max-height 0.2s ease-out;
  will-change: max-height; 
}

/* Reveal full quote on card hover (HOVER CLASS) */
.card_case-study:hover .text-style-quote1 {
  -webkit-line-clamp: 15; 
  max-height: 25em; 
  /* SLOWER SPEED FOR WHEN THEY HOVER (The "In" animation) */
  transition: max-height 0.4s ease-in-out;
}

.text-style-quote1::before { content: "“"; }
.text-style-quote1::after { content: "”"; }

/* ==========================================
   4. GRADIENTS & SOFT BLUR (Restored to your original setup)
   ========================================== */

/* BASE CLASS (Unhovered state) */
.card_case-study-gradient {
  position: absolute;
  inset: auto 0% -0.5%;
  z-index: 1;
  height: 55%;
  background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, hsla(0, 0.00%, 0.00%, 0.00), var(--core--black) 59%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);
  mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);

  /* Push it down slightly by default, and set the fast "Out" speed */
  transform: translateY(15%); 
  transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
  will-change: transform;
}

@media screen and (min-width: 1440px) {
  .card_case-study-gradient {
    position: absolute;
    inset: auto 0% -1%;
    z-index: 1;
    height: 55%;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(13, 13, 23, 0), rgb(13, 13, 23) 80%);
    backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);
    
    /* Ensure the transform stays applied on desktop breakpoints */
    transform: translateY(15%); 
  }
}

.card_case-study:hover .card_case-study-gradient {

}

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const tracks = document.querySelectorAll('[carousel-content]');
  if (!tracks.length) return;

  // Clone logos
  tracks.forEach(track => {
    const originals = Array.from(track.children);
    originals.forEach(el => {
      const clone = el.cloneNode(true);
      clone.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      track.appendChild(clone);
    });
  });

  // Keep track of the initial window width
  let windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
  let resizeTimer;

  // Restart animation ONLY if the window width changes
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    // Check if the current width is different from the stored width
    if (window.innerWidth !== windowWidth) {
      windowWidth = window.innerWidth; // Update the stored width
      
      clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      resizeTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        tracks.forEach(track => {
          track.style.animation = 'none';
          track.offsetHeight; // force reflow
          track.style.animation = '';
        });
      }, 150);
    }
  });
});
</script></div><div class="ticker-horizontal_fade-left"></div><div class="ticker-horizontal_fade-right"></div><div carousel-content="true" class="ticker-horizontal_content"><img
